title: spondias chinensis
intro: Spondias chinensis, also known as the Chinese plum or Chinese apple, is a deciduous tree native to southern China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spondias chinensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and supporting digestive health. Spondias chinensis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a raw herb or in combination with other herbs.
